## Which layer does this belong to?

<!--
Per the README's "least-powerful mechanism" principle, check the LOWEST layer that
guarantees the behavior you need.
-->

- [ ] `CLAUDE.md` / `rules/` — advisory convention
- [ ] `settings.json` permissions — trust boundary
- [ ] Hook — must happen every time, zero exceptions
- [ ] Skill — on-demand workflow
- [ ] Subagent — isolated context
